---
title: "Audit_Analysis_Code"
author: "Krish"
format: html
editor: visual
toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    fig-width: 12
    fig-height: 7
    self-contained: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    fig-width: 12
    fig-height: 7
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Libraries

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(patchwork)
```

## Data Cleaning and Preparation 

```{r}
df <- read_csv("alcohol data.csv") |>
  mutate(
    Alc_Score  = as.numeric(Alc_Score),
    Age        = as.numeric(Age),
    Gender     = as.numeric(Gender),
    Year       = as.numeric(Year),
    Res_Area   = as.numeric(Res_Area),

    Gender_lbl = factor(Gender, levels = 1:2, labels = c("Male", "Female")),

    Year_lbl   = factor(Year, levels = 1:5,
                        labels = c("1st Year","2nd Year","3rd Year",
                                   "4th Year","5th+ Year")),

    Res        = case_when(
      Res_Area %in% c(1, 2, 3) ~ "On-Campus",
      TRUE                     ~ "Off-Campus"
    ),

    # AUDIT behavioral categories
    any_drink  = as.numeric(Alc_Score > 0),
    hazardous  = as.numeric(Alc_Score >= 8),
    harmful    = as.numeric(Alc_Score >= 16)
  )

n_total <- sum(!is.na(df$Alc_Score))
cat("Total valid responses:", n_total, "\n")

df
```

## One-proportion z-test

```{r}
one_prop_z <- function(p_sample, p0, n) {
  se <- sqrt(p0 * (1 - p0) / n)
  z  <- (p_sample - p0) / se
  p  <- 2 * pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)
  list(z = round(z, 3), p = round(p, 4))
}

sig_label <- function(p) {
  if      (p < 0.001) "< .001***"
  else if (p < 0.01)  paste0(sprintf("%.3f", p), "**")
  else if (p < 0.05)  paste0(sprintf("%.3f", p), "*")
  else                paste0(sprintf("%.3f", p), " ns")
}

one_prop_z
sig_label
```

##  Prevalence of Drinking Behaviors: UMass SPHHS vs. National Table

```{r}
compute_row <- function(subdf, label, n_nat, p_any_nat, p_haz_nat) {
  n_u     <- sum(!is.na(subdf$Alc_Score))
  p_any_u <- mean(subdf$any_drink, na.rm = TRUE)
  p_haz_u <- mean(subdf$hazardous, na.rm = TRUE)

  z1 <- one_prop_z(p_any_u, p_any_nat, n_u)
  z2 <- one_prop_z(p_haz_u, p_haz_nat, n_u)

  tibble(
    Group          = label,
    `N (UMass)`    = n_u,
    `N (National)` = n_nat,
    `Any Drink — UMass %`    = sprintf("%.1f", p_any_u * 100),
    `Any Drink — National %` = sprintf("%.1f", p_any_nat * 100),
    `Any Drink — z`          = sprintf("%.2f", z1$z),
    `Any Drink — p`          = sig_label(z1$p),
    `Hazardous — UMass %`    = sprintf("%.1f", p_haz_u * 100),
    `Hazardous — National %` = sprintf("%.1f", p_haz_nat * 100),
    `Hazardous — z`          = sprintf("%.2f", z2$z),
    `Hazardous — p`          = sig_label(z2$p)
  )
}

male_df   <- df |> filter(Gender_lbl == "Male")
female_df <- df |> filter(Gender_lbl == "Female")

table_data <- bind_rows(
  compute_row(df,        "Total UMass SPHHS",  1776, 0.809, 0.481),
  compute_row(male_df,   "  Male",              727,  0.822, 0.534),
  compute_row(df |> filter(Gender_lbl == "Male",   Res == "On-Campus"),
              "    On-Campus",  251, 0.804, 0.540),
  compute_row(df |> filter(Gender_lbl == "Male",   Res == "Off-Campus"),
              "    Off-Campus", 476, 0.832, 0.531),
  compute_row(female_df, "  Female",           1049, 0.796, 0.434),
  compute_row(df |> filter(Gender_lbl == "Female", Res == "On-Campus"),
              "    On-Campus",  294, 0.795, 0.496),
  compute_row(df |> filter(Gender_lbl == "Female", Res == "Off-Campus"),
              "    Off-Campus", 755, 0.797, 0.410)
)

table_data |>
  kbl(
    caption = "Table 1. Prevalence of Drinking Behaviors and One-Proportion Z-Test Results: UMass SPHHS vs. National College Sample (Ages 18–29)",
    align   = c("l", rep("c", ncol(table_data) - 1))
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "bordered"),
    full_width        = TRUE,
    font_size         = 13
  ) |>
  add_header_above(c(
    " " = 3,
    "Any Drinking" = 4,
    "Hazardous Drinking (AUDIT ≥ 8)" = 4
  )) |>
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, background = "#1B3A6B", color = "white") |>
  row_spec(1, bold = TRUE, background = "#D9E2F3") |>
  row_spec(c(2, 5), background = "#EEF2F9") |>
  footnote(
    general = "National benchmarks: Dawson et al. (2004), college students on+off campus, ages 18–29. Hazardous = AUDIT ≥ 8. *** p < .001  ** p < .01  * p < .05  ns = not significant.",
    general_title = "Note: "
  )
```

## UMass SPHHS vs. National: Side-by-Side Bar Graphs with Z-Test Results 

```{r}
national <- tibble(
  group     = c("Overall", "Overall", "Overall",
                "Male",    "Male",    "Male",
                "Female",  "Female",  "Female"),
  category  = rep(c("Any Drinking",
                    "Hazardous Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 8)",
                    "Harmful Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 16)"), 3),
  pct       = c(80.9, 48.1, 26.8,
                82.2, 53.4, 35.0,
                79.6, 43.4, 27.0),
  source    = "National\n(College 18–29)"
)

umass_overall <- df |>
  summarise(
    any  = mean(any_drink,  na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    haz  = mean(hazardous,  na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    harm = mean(harmful,    na.rm = TRUE) * 100
  )

umass_male <- df |> filter(Gender_lbl == "Male") |>
  summarise(
    any  = mean(any_drink,  na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    haz  = mean(hazardous,  na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    harm = mean(harmful,    na.rm = TRUE) * 100
  )

umass_female <- df |> filter(Gender_lbl == "Female") |>
  summarise(
    any  = mean(any_drink,  na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    haz  = mean(hazardous,  na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    harm = mean(harmful,    na.rm = TRUE) * 100
  )

umass <- tibble(
  group    = c("Overall","Overall","Overall",
               "Male","Male","Male",
               "Female","Female","Female"),
  category = rep(c("Any Drinking",
                   "Hazardous Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 8)",
                   "Harmful Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 16)"), 3),
  pct      = c(umass_overall$any,  umass_overall$haz,  umass_overall$harm,
               umass_male$any,     umass_male$haz,     umass_male$harm,
               umass_female$any,   umass_female$haz,   umass_female$harm),
  source   = "UMass SPHHS"
)

plot_df <- bind_rows(umass, national) |>
  mutate(
    group    = factor(group,    levels = c("Overall","Male","Female")),
    category = factor(category, levels = c("Any Drinking",
                                           "Hazardous Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 8)",
                                           "Harmful Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 16)")),
    source   = factor(source,   levels = c("UMass SPHHS", "National\n(College 18–29)"))
  )

# ── Z-test p-values for annotation ───────────────────────────────────────────
pval_df <- tribble(
  ~group,     ~category,                               ~umass_pct, ~nat_pct, ~n_u, ~p0,
  "Overall",  "Any Drinking",                            76.4,       80.9,    203,  0.809,
  "Overall",  "Hazardous Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 8)",         32.5,       48.1,    203,  0.481,
  "Overall",  "Harmful Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 16)",           3.0,       26.8,    203,  0.268,
  "Male",     "Any Drinking",                            67.5,       82.2,     40,  0.822,
  "Male",     "Hazardous Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 8)",         32.5,       53.4,     40,  0.534,
  "Male",     "Harmful Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 16)",           5.0,       35.0,     40,  0.350,
  "Female",   "Any Drinking",                            78.4,       79.6,    162,  0.796,
  "Female",   "Hazardous Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 8)",         32.1,       43.4,    162,  0.434,
  "Female",   "Harmful Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 16)",           2.5,       27.0,    162,  0.270
) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    z_stat    = one_prop_z(umass_pct / 100, p0, n_u)$z,
    p_val     = one_prop_z(umass_pct / 100, p0, n_u)$p,
    p_label   = case_when(
      p_val < 0.001 ~ "p < .001***",
      p_val < 0.01  ~ paste0("p = ", sprintf("%.3f", p_val), "**"),
      p_val < 0.05  ~ paste0("p = ", sprintf("%.3f", p_val), "*"),
      TRUE          ~ paste0("p = ", sprintf("%.3f", p_val), " (ns)")
    ),
    sig_color = if_else(p_val < 0.05, "#C0392B", "#27AE60"),
    y_pos     = pmax(umass_pct, nat_pct) + 6,
    group     = factor(group,    levels = c("Overall","Male","Female")),
    category  = factor(category, levels = c("Any Drinking",
                                            "Hazardous Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 8)",
                                            "Harmful Drinking\n(AUDIT ≥ 16)"))
  ) |>
  ungroup()

#| label: fig3-plot
#| fig-cap: "Figure 3. Comparison of drinking behavior prevalence: UMass SPHHS students vs. national college sample (ages 18–29). Brackets indicate one-proportion z-test results. *** p < .001  ** p < .01  * p < .05  ns = not significant."
#| fig-width: 16
#| fig-height: 8


group_labels <- c(
  "Overall" = "Overall\n(UMass n=203)",
  "Male"    = "Male\n(UMass n=40)",
  "Female"  = "Female\n(UMass n=162)"
)

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = category, y = pct, fill = source)) +
  geom_col(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.72),
    width    = 0.65,
    alpha    = 0.88,
    color    = "white",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(pct, 1), "%")),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.72),
    vjust    = -0.5,
    fontface = "bold",
    size     = 3.8
  ) +
  # Significance brackets
  geom_segment(
    data = pval_df,
    aes(x    = as.numeric(category) - 0.18,
        xend = as.numeric(category) + 0.18,
        y    = y_pos + 1.5,
        yend = y_pos + 1.5),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "#2C3E50", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data        = pval_df,
    aes(x = category, y = y_pos + 4.5, label = p_label, color = sig_color),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fontface    = "bold",
    size        = 3.2
  ) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("UMass SPHHS"              = "#2C6FAC",
               "National\n(College 18–29)" = "#C0392B"),
    name   = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(scale = 1),
    limits = c(0, 108),
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 20)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~group,
    labeller = as_labeller(group_labels)
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Figure 3. Comparison of Drinking Behavior Prevalence:\nUMass SPHHS Students vs. National College Sample (One-Proportion Z-Test)",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Prevalence (%)",
    caption  = "National benchmarks: Dawson et al. (2004). *** p < .001  ** p < .01  * p < .05  ns = not significant."
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position  = "top",
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    plot.caption     = element_text(color = "gray50", size = 9)
  )
```
